title: RJs HD Dark Dreary Paintings
description: High quality full-color, from 64x up to 512x. Dark and Dreary paintings pack
body:
Dark and dreary (spooky, creepy, ominous) High-quality full-color HD paintings.
From 64x up to 512x resolutions. A good fit for dark and creepy settings. 
(Most are vanilla style, some are a little different).
All images were custom AI generated, then manually modified. 
Custom designed dark wood frame added to all paintings.
Also includes the four "operator utilities" paintings (earth, wind, water, fire).

(Added version 1.2 for 1.21.10)
